name: Image2pixel-PixelArtGenerator
short_description: Image2pixel is a professional pixel art generator that transforms regular images into beautiful pixel-style artwork. Whether you're a game developer, artist, or content creator, you can easily create the pixel art you envision.
detailed_description:
Web version for free

image2pixel.app


About the Software

Image2pixel is a pixel painting generation tool that can convert input images into pixel-style images.

The software is suitable for pixel art enthusiasts, pixel art beginners with zero art foundation, and independent pixel art game developers.

Main functions

  • Input images to view pixel painting effects in real time

  • Adjust pixel size and color number parameters to get the best effect

  • Support importing custom color palette files (supports act format)

  • Supports conversion of gif images, which can quickly generate emoticons or meme gifs

  • Supports inputting Google Gemini API Key, text-to-image generation

  • Supports Batch Processing  multiple files and folders.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Polish, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America
